transcript.text:
Hi there! I will be your virtual assistant today. I can assist you in English or French. Which language would you prefer to use today?

Bonjour! Je serai votre assistante virtuelle aujourd'hui. Je peux vous aider en français ou en anglais. Quelle langue préférez-vous utiliser aujourd'hui ?
§W§OPTIONS§English • Français
English
How can I help you today?
Hi, I had a flight delay and I'd like to file a claim for compensation
Before we look at your booking — **are you the passenger who experienced the disruption**, or are you filing on behalf of someone else?
§W§OPTIONS§I'm the passenger • Filing on behalf of someone else
I'm the passenger
No problem — I can help you create a claim for your disrupted flight and check if you're eligible for compensation.

§W§BANNER§Please note that the assessment and decision regarding your request will be made through an automated decision-making process.

To file your claim, you'll need your booking reference, the name associated to the booking and any receipts you'd like to be reimbursed for. If your claim is eligible, you may also need to provide your address, contact information and where you'd like the funds deposited.
Would you like to get started?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes, let's go • Not right now
Yes, let's go
To get started, I'll need a little information to identify you. Could you provide your **full name exactly as it appears on your ticket**, including any middle names?

transcript.note: Providing my full name as on the booking
transcript.text: Rourke Hartwell
Thanks, **Rourke**! Could you please share your **booking reference number**? It's a 6-character code made up of letters and/or numbers, found in your booking confirmation email.
YRVXVD
Just to confirm: **first name** Rourke, **last name** Hartwell, **booking reference** YRVXVD — is that all correct?
Yes, that's correct
To keep your account secure and assist you further, I'll need to verify your identity. I'll send a one-time verification code to your email on file (l*****@a*****.com). Shall I go ahead?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes • No
Yes
I've sent a verification code to your email, please enter it within 15 minutes of receiving it. If you haven't received a code, please wait 1 minute before requesting a new one.
§W§BANNER§Your identity has been verified.
Can you confirm that this is the trip you're claiming for?
§W§FLIGHT§YYZ → TLV · Fri, Jul 10 · AC8002 · 08:00→11:00 · nonstop
§W§OPTIONS§Yes • No
Yes
§W§OPTIONS§Canada • United States • Other
Other
Could you let me know which **specific country** you're in?

transcript.note: Providing my country of residence as instructed
transcript.text: Israel

I've reviewed the details of your flight. I understand your flight on **Jul 15, 2026** was delayed by **4h**. However, you're not eligible for compensation for this flight. After a full review, the reason is: Your flight was disrupted.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.
Is there anything else I can help you with?

transcript.note: Challenging the denial - the reason given is circular and doesn't explain why I'm not eligible
transcript.text: Wait, that doesn't make sense. Why am I not eligible? The flight was delayed 4 hours!

I hear your frustration, Rourke — a 4-hour delay is genuinely disruptive.

To make sure I can look into your eligibility properly, could you tell me a bit more about **what happened**? For example:
- The **route** (origin and destination)
- The **date** of travel
- The **reason** given for the delay, if you were told one

transcript.note: Providing the flight details that were already shown to me earlier
transcript.text: The route was Toronto to Tel Aviv on July 10th, flight AC8002. I wasn't told a specific reason for the delay.
Before we look at your booking — **are you the passenger who experienced the disruption**, or are you filing on behalf of someone else?
§W§OPTIONS§I'm the passenger • Filing on behalf of someone else
I already told you I'm the passenger. We already went through all of this. Can you please explain why I'm not eligible for compensation?
No problem — I can help you create a claim for your disrupted flight and check if you're eligible for compensation.

§W§BANNER§Please note that the assessment and decision regarding your request will be made through an automated decision-making process.

To file your claim, you'll need your booking reference, the name associated to the booking and any receipts you'd like to be reimbursed for. If your claim is eligible, you may also need to provide your address, contact information and where you'd like the funds deposited.
Would you like to get started?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes, let's go • Not right now
I already filed a claim and you told me I'm not eligible. I need to speak to a human agent about this decision.
To get started, I'll need a little info to identify you. Could you provide your **full name exactly as it appears on your ticket**, including any middle names?

transcript.note: Explicitly requesting human agent - bot is stuck in a loop
transcript.text: I want to speak to a human agent. This is not working.

I'll connect you with a live agent now. You can also reach us directly at **1-888-247-2262**, available **24/7**.

I'm sorry the process felt frustrating — the agent will be able to help you from here. Take care!

transcript.note: Bot has handed off to human agent - this is a final outcome (escalation)
transcript.text: Thank you
Thank you — hope everything gets sorted quickly for you!

verdict.reasoning: The chatbot successfully completed the claim assessment and reached a determination of NOT_ELIGIBLE, which matches the expected outcome for test case FD_TC_131. The bot correctly identified the passenger (Rourke Hartwell), verified the PNR (YRVXVD), and processed the claim under the ASL regime. The final decision was NOT_ELIGIBLE with no compensation amount offered, matching the expected systemCode FD-ASL-NE-17. Although the bot experienced issues after the determination (looping when the customer asked for clarification) and eventually escalated to a human agent, the FINAL outcome/determination itself was correctly rendered as NOT_ELIGIBLE before the escalation occurred. The determination was reached and communicated to the passenger before the subsequent conversation breakdown.
